recap:
- The demo focuses on implementing guardrails for Large Language Models (LLMs) in Databricks.
- It includes practical examples using both AI Playground and the Foundation Models API.
- The first step involves identifying problematic prompts within the AI Playground environment.
- Participants will manually implement guardrails to address the identified issues in AI Playground.
- The final step is to migrate the established guardrails to the Foundation Models API for broader application.
